name: Places
schema: id INTEGER PRIMARY KEY AUTOINCREMENT, name TEXT NOT NULL, postcode TEXT NOT NULL, cover TEXT

name: Accounts
schema: id INTEGER PRIMARY KEY AUTOINCREMENT, email TEXT UNIQUE NOT NULL, password TEXT NOT NULL, role TEXT NOT NULL

name: Sessions
schema: id INTEGER PRIMARY KEY AUTOINCREMENT, email TEXT UNIQUE NOT NULL, token TEXT NOT NULL

name: Ratings
schema: id INTEGER PRIMARY KEY AUTOINCREMENT, place TEXT NOT NULL, email TEXT NOT NULL, rating INTEGER NOT NULL
